item.title: The 106th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 9 - Skills dotGifs
item.description:
Wi-Fi WARNING!!! 54-count Sound dotGif Dump!
I don't know why the sound doesn't work on some of these
If all y'all all got any where the person fails at this, please link in comments (Reference #7)
This was also in the Music Dump yesterday
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Pure skill
The post I stole this from had a comment with a link to more of their stuff. I can no longer find it. Please link in comments if you have it! (Reference #14)
This girl is amazing. Anyone with links to more of her stuff or any idea of her online ID, please link below (Ref #15) I really hope she doesn't peak young and burnout like so many others.
#20
#25
No sound on this one.
I love Milana
*Makes It Rain* This needs to be a regular thing at strip clubs.
#30
PORTAL WOMBAT!!! I unfortunately DO NOT have links to the uncut versions of these!
#35
#36
#37
#38
#39
#40
No sound on this one.
No sound on this one.
No sound on this one. #45
#50
Amazing
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #Sound_On #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. III Vol 61 https://imgur.com/gallery/VNlNlNX - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. IV Vol 62 https://imgur.com/gallery/5BAeeTJ - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. V Vol 63 https://imgur.com/gallery/SZlkuUY - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. VI Vol 64 https://imgur.com/gallery/KBtYW2X - Obvious Plant (and the like) Vol 65 https://imgur.com/gallery/4tggfcY - BEEEEEEEEEESSSSS!!! Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v. item.title: A little wholesomeness
item.dc:creator: ObsessedWithAnimals

item.title: 15 modern and extinct relatives compared
item.description:
White rhinoceros and Paraceratherium Artworks by paleoartist Roman Uchytel
African lion and American lion
Raccoon and Giant raccoon
Emperor penguin and Colossus penguin
Sumatran rhinoceros and Woolly rhinoceros
Giraffe and Sivatherium
Giant armadillo and Glyptodon
African bush elephant and Asian straight-tusked elephant
Cape buffalo and African long-horned buffalo
North American cougar and Eurasian puma
Grvy's zebra and Macrauchenia
North American beaver and Giant beaver
Bactrian camel and Titanotylopus
Fallow deer and Irish elk/Giant deer
Clouded leopard and Smilodon ["Sabertooth cat"]
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.dc:creator: Braxa

item.title: Woohoo! I'm still lovable!
item.description:
You may ask yourself, why am I sharing this with Imgur? Because I'm happy and I like Imgur, and whoever you are I think you're great. End of preamble. It's been a long and lonely time in my life, lots of anxiety, stress, and problems. Not to focus too much on the bad, but I was feeling pretty unlovable. Turns out (and I know what you lovely people are going to say), I'm not! This cute guy invited me over for a movie yesterday, he suggested a Godzilla movie, apparently he knew what to offer me. Nothing better than snuggling while cities get destroyed on screen.
I know I'm not the only one to think this before a date! My anxiety kicked in to overdrive while getting ready. I haven't had to think about looking nice for anyone other than myself in a long time. Luckily I had gotten a gel manicure last week, saved myself a chunk of time yesterday. I may have over-prepared. Oh well, at least I feel good about myself.
Godzilla meme tax. King Of The Monsters is my favorite of the current American run. Most Viral Edit: Y'all is crazy! I love you for it. Send giant lizard puns.
item.dc:creator: QueenKaijus

item.title: Ridiculously smart, sorry if repost
item.description: As fellow imgurite @Bladedrummer pointed out, this has turned out to be false. I so wanted to believe it. Sorry for lying to you. https://thelogicalindian.com/fact-check/aamir-khan-donate-rs-15000-sacks-one-kilo-20984
